title: Bitcoin or Ethereum in 2026: Which Crypto Offers Better Upside as Markets Heat Up?
description: NEW YORK — As Bitcoin trades near $81,000 and Ethereum hovers around $2,330 in mid-May 2026, investors face a familiar dilemma: which digital asset deserves capital in what many analysts call a pivotal year for crypto adoption. With spot ETFs driving institutional inflows, clearer U.S. regulation on the horizon and macroeconomic uncertainty lingering, both flagship cryptocurrencies present compelling but distinct cases.

title: CME Is Launching a Bitcoin VIX: Here’s Why That Changes Wall Street’s Bitcoin Game
description: For years, Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) traders have focused on one main question: where is BTC headed next? But on Wall Street, another question matters just as much: how violently will BTC move along the way? That is the market CME Group is targeting. title: Crypto Has Quietly Outperformed Every Major Asset Class in 2026
description: This year, there is an odd silence surrounding cryptocurrency that borders on suspicion. The focus has shifted to other topics, such as Middle East oil shocks, AI valuations, and a stock market that continues to decline unexpectedly. Nevertheless, Bitcoin has been making a comeback somewhere beneath all that commotion.
